scripts.wrangler:dev: npm run build && opennextjs-cloudflare build && node scripts/patch-worker.js && wrangler dev --port 8787
scripts.deploy: opennextjs-cloudflare build && node scripts/patch-worker.js && opennextjs-cloudflare deploy
scripts.upload: opennextjs-cloudflare build && node scripts/patch-worker.js && opennextjs-cloudflare upload
scripts.preview: opennextjs-cloudflare build && node scripts/patch-worker.js && opennextjs-cloudflare preview
